query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as unique_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT orderNumber) as unique_orders,
  MIN(createdAt) as earliest,
  MAX(createdAt) as latest,
  AVG(orderAmount) as avg_amount,
  SUM(orderAmount) as total_amount
FROM point_requests;
